description: Machine-readable L0-L3 layer taxonomy for nettoolskit-ui. Source of truth for the docs/architecture/layers.md taxonomy and the scripts/check-layers.mjs dependency-direction gate. Glob rules are evaluated in order; the first match wins, so more specific composites are listed before the generic Ds*.vue primitive rule.

core.label: L2-core (pure)
core.summary: Framework-free contracts, class recipes (getNtk*Classes), schema (defineForm/defineResource), validation, icons. Zero Vue, ~zero DOM.

L1.label: L1 (composites)
L1.summary: DsCrudPage / DsFormPage composites that hand-compose Ds* primitives. First-class escape hatch.

L2-vue.label: L2 (schema renderer)
L2-vue.summary: DsForm.vue renders the pure defineForm/defineResource schema output.

L0.label: L0 (primitives + install)
L0.summary: Ds* primitives and createNetToolsKitUI() one-line install.

L3.label: L3 (recipe catalog)
L3.summary: Sample apps that teach approved composition. Consume the public API only.

rules.description: Forbidden dependency edges. Direction is L2-core <- L0 <- L1 <- L2-vue <- L3; everything pure lives in core. Each rule says: a file in `from` must NOT import a file classified as one of `forbidImportsOf`, nor any bare module in `forbidBareModules`, nor any path under `forbidPathPrefixes`.

edges.reason: core/ must stay framework-free and DOM-free so it ports to any framework as-is (the binding contract).
An L0 primitive must not depend on an L1 composite (wrong-direction dependency: composites are built ON primitives, not the reverse).
